title: 这条 prompt 详细描述了如何生成一张高质量的写实肖像，适合用于高端个人品牌推广或艺术摄影作品展示。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 详细描述了如何生成一张高质量的写实肖像，适合用于高端个人品牌推广或艺术摄影作品展示。
prompt_original: Use my uploaded portrait photo as the only identity reference. Preserve only the person’s real facial features, face shape, hairstyle, hair color, skin tone, and overall temperament. Generate an ultra-realistic close-up portrait in natural light. The subject is shown in side profile, gently lowering her head toward a blooming white lily. The flower is placed in the foreground and covered with visible dewdrops. Warm golden backlight comes from the side and behind, creating a soft glowing rim light on the hair, with slight lens flare and a shallow depth of field. The background is a dark green natural blur. The expression is calm, soft, and natural, with the subject not looking at the camera. Keep realistic skin texture, clear eyelashes, and detailed hair strands. The overall mood is romantic, clean, dreamy, and cinematic, like a summer morning photo. Vertical 9:16, high-quality realistic photography, no text, no watermark
prompt_zh: 使用我上传的肖像照片作为唯一身份参考。仅保留人物的真实面部特征、脸型、发型、发色、肤色和整体气质。生成一张在自然光下的超写实特写肖像。主体以侧面轮廓呈现，轻轻低头朝向一朵盛开的白色百合花。花朵位于前景，并带有可见的露珠。温暖的金色背光从侧面和后方照射过来，在头发上形成柔和的边缘光，并有轻微的镜头眩光和浅景深。背景是深绿色的自然模糊效果。表情平静、柔和且自然，主体不看镜头。保持真实的皮肤质感、清晰的睫毛和细致的发丝。整体氛围浪漫、干净、梦幻且具有电影感，如同夏日早晨的照片。竖版9:16，高质量写实摄影，无文字，无水印。
